title: Material
description: Physical material. Weapons and armor reference a material_id; the combat engine reads these properties directly instead of hard-coding damage numbers.

density_kg_m3.description: Physical density in kg/m³. Used to derive striking_mass from geometry when not overridden on the weapon.

yield_strength.description: Resistance to penetration. Layer resistance = yield_strength × thickness_mm. Scale: cloth ~0.03, leather ~0.20, wood ~0.35, iron ~1.0, steel ~1.80.

shear_strength.description: Additional resistance to slash/pierce specifically (edge weapons exploit this less than blunt). steel ~0.5, leather ~0.25, cloth ~0.

blunt_transfer.description: Fraction of momentum that transfers through an un-penetrated layer as concussive shock. cloth=0.95, leather=0.65, mail=0.45, plate=0.20.

edge_retention.description: Multiplier on effective contact_area_cm2 for slash/pierce attacks made from this material. High = blade stays sharp longer per quality tier.
